memberdef.definition: using PolarSplineFEMPoissonLikeAssembler< GridR, GridTheta, PolarBSplinesRTheta, SplineRThetaEvaluatorNullBound, QDimRMesh, QDimThetaMesh, IdxRangeFull >::R = typename GridR::continuous_dimension_type
memberdef.name: R

briefdescription.para: The radial dimension.

memberdef.definition: using PolarSplineFEMPoissonLikeAssembler< GridR, GridTheta, PolarBSplinesRTheta, SplineRThetaEvaluatorNullBound, QDimRMesh, QDimThetaMesh, IdxRangeFull >::Theta = typename GridTheta::continuous_dimension_type
memberdef.name: Theta

briefdescription.para: The poloidal dimension.

memberdef.definition: using PolarSplineFEMPoissonLikeAssembler< GridR, GridTheta, PolarBSplinesRTheta, SplineRThetaEvaluatorNullBound, QDimRMesh, QDimThetaMesh, IdxRangeFull >::R_cov = typename R::Dual
memberdef.name: R_cov

briefdescription.para: The radial dimension.

memberdef.definition: using PolarSplineFEMPoissonLikeAssembler< GridR, GridTheta, PolarBSplinesRTheta, SplineRThetaEvaluatorNullBound, QDimRMesh, QDimThetaMesh, IdxRangeFull >::Theta_cov = typename Theta::Dual

briefdescription.para: The poloidal dimension.

memberdef.definition: using PolarSplineFEMPoissonLikeAssembler< GridR, GridTheta, PolarBSplinesRTheta, SplineRThetaEvaluatorNullBound, QDimRMesh, QDimThetaMesh, IdxRangeFull >::BSplinesR = typename PolarBSplinesRTheta::BSplinesR_tag

briefdescription.para: The 1D B-splines in the radial direction.

memberdef.definition: using PolarSplineFEMPoissonLikeAssembler< GridR, GridTheta, PolarBSplinesRTheta, SplineRThetaEvaluatorNullBound, QDimRMesh, QDimThetaMesh, IdxRangeFull >::BSplinesTheta = typename PolarBSplinesRTheta::BSplinesTheta_tag

briefdescription.para: The 1D B-splines in the poloidal direction.

memberdef.name: m_batch_idx

memberdef.definition: DField<IdxRangeQuadratureRTheta> PolarSplineFEMPoissonLikeAssembler< GridR, GridTheta, PolarBSplinesRTheta, SplineRThetaEvaluatorNullBound, QDimRMesh, QDimThetaMesh, IdxRangeFull >::m_int_volume
memberdef.name: m_int_volume

memberdef.definition: PolarSplineFEMPoissonLikeAssembler< GridR, GridTheta, PolarBSplinesRTheta, SplineRThetaEvaluatorNullBound, QDimRMesh, QDimThetaMesh, IdxRangeFull >::PolarSplineFEMPoissonLikeAssembler
memberdef.name: PolarSplineFEMPoissonLikeAssembler

briefdescription.para: Instantiate the assembler operator.

parameterdescription.para: The initialised field of Jacobian values of the mapping.

memberdef.definition: void PolarSplineFEMPoissonLikeAssembler< GridR, GridTheta, PolarBSplinesRTheta, SplineRThetaEvaluatorNullBound, QDimRMesh, QDimThetaMesh, IdxRangeFull >::operator()
memberdef.argsstring: (std::unique_ptr< MatrixBatchCsr< Kokkos::DefaultExecutionSpace, MatrixBatchCsrSolver::CG > > &gko_matrix, ConstSpline2D coeff_alpha, ConstSpline2D coeff_beta, Mapping const &mapping, SplineRThetaEvaluatorNullBound const &spline_evaluator, std::optional< int > max_iter=std::nullopt, std::optional< double > res_tol=std::nullopt, std::optional< bool > batch_solver_logger=std::nullopt, std::optional< int > preconditioner_max_block_size=std::nullopt)
memberdef.name: operator()

briefdescription.para: Assemble the stiffness matrix.

parameterdescription.para: The pointer to the assembled matrix.
The spline representation of the $ \alpha $ function in the definition of the Poisson-like equation.
The spline representation of the $ \beta $ function in the definition of the Poisson-like equation.
The mapping from the logical domain to the physical domain where the equation is defined.
An evaluator for evaluating 2D splines on $(r,\theta)$.
The maximum number of iterations possible for the batched CSR solver.
The residual tolerance for the batched CSR solver. Be careful! the relative residual provided here, will be used as "implicit residual" in ginkgo solver.
Indicates whether log information such as the residual and the number of iterations should be monitored.
The maximum size of the Jacobi preconditioner used by the batched CSR solver.
A class describing a mapping from curvilinear coordinates to Cartesian coordinates.

memberdef.definition: void PolarSplineFEMPoissonLikeAssembler< GridR, GridTheta, PolarBSplinesRTheta, SplineRThetaEvaluatorNullBound, QDimRMesh, QDimThetaMesh, IdxRangeFull >::compute_singular_elements
memberdef.argsstring: (ConstSpline2D coeff_alpha, ConstSpline2D coeff_beta, Mapping const &mapping, SplineRThetaEvaluatorNullBound const &spline_evaluator, Kokkos::View< double **, Kokkos::LayoutRight, Kokkos::DefaultExecutionSpace > const values_csr, Kokkos::View< int *, Kokkos::LayoutRight, Kokkos::DefaultExecutionSpace > const col_idx_csr, Kokkos::View< int *, Kokkos::LayoutRight, Kokkos::DefaultExecutionSpace > const nnz_per_row_csr)
memberdef.name: compute_singular_elements

briefdescription.para: Computes the matrix element corresponding to the singular area. ie: the region enclosing the O-point.

parameterdescription.para: The spline representation of the $ \alpha $ function in the definition of the Poisson-like equation.
The spline representation of the $ \beta $ function in the definition of the Poisson-like equation.
The mapping from the logical domain to the physical domain where the equation is defined.
An evaluator for evaluating 2D splines on $(r,\theta)$.
A 2D Kokkos view which stores the values of non-zero elements for the whole batch.
A 1D Kokkos view which stores the column indices for each non-zero component.(only for one matrix).
A 1D Kokkos view of length matrix_size+1 which stores the count of the non-zeros along the lines of the matrix.

memberdef.definition: void PolarSplineFEMPoissonLikeAssembler< GridR, GridTheta, PolarBSplinesRTheta, SplineRThetaEvaluatorNullBound, QDimRMesh, QDimThetaMesh, IdxRangeFull >::compute_overlapping_singular_elements
memberdef.argsstring: (ConstSpline2D coeff_alpha, ConstSpline2D coeff_beta, Mapping const &mapping, SplineRThetaEvaluatorNullBound const &spline_evaluator, Kokkos::View< double **, Kokkos::LayoutRight, Kokkos::DefaultExecutionSpace > const values_csr, Kokkos::View< int *, Kokkos::LayoutRight, Kokkos::DefaultExecutionSpace > const col_idx_csr, Kokkos::View< int *, Kokkos::LayoutRight, Kokkos::DefaultExecutionSpace > const nnz_per_row_csr)
memberdef.name: compute_overlapping_singular_elements

briefdescription.para: Computes the matrix element corresponding to singular elements overlapping with regular grid.

parameterdescription.para: The spline representation of the $ \alpha $ function in the definition of the Poisson-like equation.
The spline representation of the $ \beta $ function in the definition of the Poisson-like equation.
The mapping from the logical domain to the physical domain where the equation is defined.
An evaluator for evaluating 2D splines on $(r,\theta)$.
A 2D Kokkos view which stores the values of non-zero elements for the whole batch.
A 1D Kokkos view which stores the column indices for each non-zero component.(only for one matrix)
A 1D Kokkos view of length matrix_size+1 which stores the count of the non-zeros along the lines of the matrix.

memberdef.definition: void PolarSplineFEMPoissonLikeAssembler< GridR, GridTheta, PolarBSplinesRTheta, SplineRThetaEvaluatorNullBound, QDimRMesh, QDimThetaMesh, IdxRangeFull >::compute_stencil_elements
memberdef.argsstring: (ConstSpline2D coeff_alpha, ConstSpline2D coeff_beta, Mapping const &mapping, SplineRThetaEvaluatorNullBound const &spline_evaluator, Kokkos::View< double **, Kokkos::LayoutRight, Kokkos::DefaultExecutionSpace > const values_csr, Kokkos::View< int *, Kokkos::LayoutRight, Kokkos::DefaultExecutionSpace > const col_idx_csr, Kokkos::View< int *, Kokkos::LayoutRight, Kokkos::DefaultExecutionSpace > const nnz_per_row_csr)
memberdef.name: compute_stencil_elements

briefdescription.para: Computes the matrix element corresponding to the regular stencil ie: out to singular or overlapping areas.

parameterdescription.para: The spline representation of the $ \alpha $ function in the definition of the Poisson-like equation.
The spline representation of the $ \beta $ function in the definition of the Poisson-like equation.
The mapping from the logical domain to the physical domain where the equation is defined.
An evaluator for evaluating 2D splines on $(r,\theta)$.
A 2D Kokkos view which stores the values of non-zero elements for the whole batch.
A 1D Kokkos view which stores the column indices for each non-zero component.(only for one matrix)
A 1D Kokkos view of length matrix_size+1 which stores the count of the non-zeros along the lines of the matrix.

memberdef.definition: void PolarSplineFEMPoissonLikeAssembler< GridR, GridTheta, PolarBSplinesRTheta, SplineRThetaEvaluatorNullBound, QDimRMesh, QDimThetaMesh, IdxRangeFull >::init_nnz_per_line
memberdef.name: init_nnz_per_line

briefdescription.para: Fills the nnz data structure by computing the number of non-zero per line. This number is linked to the weak formulation and depends on $(r,\theta)$ splines. After this function the array will contain: nnz_per_row[0] = 0. nnz_per_row[1] = 0. nnz_per_row[2] = number of non-zero elements in line 0. nnz_per_row[3] = number of non-zero elements in lines 0-1. ..._per_row nnz_per_row[matrix_size] = number of non-zero elements in lines 0-(matrix_size-1).

parameterdescription.para: A 1D Kokkos view of length matrix_size+1 which stores the sum of the non-zeros in the matrix on all lines up to the one in.

memberdef.definition: static KOKKOS_FUNCTION double PolarSplineFEMPoissonLikeAssembler< GridR, GridTheta, PolarBSplinesRTheta, SplineRThetaEvaluatorNullBound, QDimRMesh, QDimThetaMesh, IdxRangeFull >::weak_integral_element
memberdef.argsstring: (IdxBSPolar idx_test, IdxBSPolar idx_trial, IdxQuadratureRTheta idx_quad, ConstSpline2D coeff_alpha, ConstSpline2D coeff_beta, SplineRThetaEvaluatorNullBound const &spline_evaluator, Mapping const &mapping, DField< IdxRangeQuadratureRTheta > int_volume)
memberdef.name: weak_integral_element

briefdescription.para: Computes a quadrature summand for computing the integral corresponding to the inner product.

detaileddescription.para: Inner product of the test and trial spline is computed using a quadrature. This function returns one summand of the quadrature for the quadrature point given by the indices.

parameterdescription.para: The index of the test basis spline.
The index of the trial basis spline.
The index for the point in the quadrature scheme.
The spline representation of the $ \alpha $ function in the definition of the Poisson-like equation.
The spline representation of the $ \beta $ function in the definition of the Poisson-like equation.
An evaluator for evaluating 2D splines on $(r,\theta)$.
The mapping from the logical domain to the physical domain where the equation is defined.
The integral volume associated with each point used in the quadrature scheme.

memberdef.definition: static KOKKOS_FUNCTION double PolarSplineFEMPoissonLikeAssembler< GridR, GridTheta, PolarBSplinesRTheta, SplineRThetaEvaluatorNullBound, QDimRMesh, QDimThetaMesh, IdxRangeFull >::get_matrix_stencil_element
memberdef.argsstring: (const Kokkos::TeamPolicy<>::member_type &team, IdxBSRTheta idx_test, IdxBSRTheta idx_trial, ConstSpline2D coeff_alpha, ConstSpline2D coeff_beta, SplineRThetaEvaluatorNullBound const &evaluator, Mapping const &mapping, IdxRangeQuadratureRTheta const &full_quad_idx_range, DField< IdxRangeQuadratureRTheta > int_volume)
memberdef.name: get_matrix_stencil_element

briefdescription.para: Computes the matrix element corresponding to two tensor product splines with index idx_test and idx_trial.

parameterdescription.para: The team of threads from which this function is called.
The index for polar B-spline in the test space.
The index for polar B-spline in the trial space.
The spline representation of the $ \alpha $ function in the definition of the Poisson-like equation.
The spline representation of the $ \beta $ function in the definition of the Poisson-like equation.
An evaluator for evaluating 2D splines on $ (r, \theta) $.
The mapping from the logical domain to the physical domain where the equation is defined.
The index range of all the quadrature points.
The field describing the quadrature coefficients including the Jacobian multiplication factor responsible for ensuring the correct volume for the integral.

simplesect.para: The value of the matrix element.

memberdef.definition: static KOKKOS_INLINE_FUNCTION IdxBSPolar PolarSplineFEMPoissonLikeAssembler< GridR, GridTheta, PolarBSplinesRTheta, SplineRThetaEvaluatorNullBound, QDimRMesh, QDimThetaMesh, IdxRangeFull >::to_polar
memberdef.name: to_polar

briefdescription.para: Convert a 2D (r,theta) bspline index into a polar bspline index.

parameterdescription.para: The 2D (r,theta) bspline index.

briefdescription.para: An operator to assemble a Poisson-like stiffness matrix using polar B-splines.

detaileddescription.para: Assemble the finite element stiffness matrix with entries $ \int \alpha \nabla B_i \cdot \nabla B_j + \beta B_i B_j dx $ for $0 < i,j < N $ where $ N $ is the number of polar splines. We only consider splines that vanish on the boundary.

For more details see the PolarSplineFEMPoissonLikeSolver and Emily Bourne's thesis ("Non-Uniform Numerical Schemes for the Modelling of Turbulence in the 5D GYSELA Code". December 2022.)
GridR
The radial grid type.
GridR
The poloidal grid type.
PolarBSplinesRTheta
The type of the 2D polar B-splines (on the coordinate system $(r,\theta)$ including B-splines which traverse the O point).
SplineRThetaEvaluatorNullBound
The type of the 2D (cross-product) spline evaluator.
QDimRMesh
The radial quadrature grid type.
QDimThetaMesh
The poloidal quadrature grid type.
IdxRangeFull
The full index range of $ \phi $ including any batch dimensions.
